mapper.select: SELECT * FROM highlight_notes WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO highlight_notes(id, user_id, verse_id, color, note_text, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(gen_random_uuid(), #{userId}, #{verseId}, #{color}, #{noteText}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE highlight_notes SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM highlight_notes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM highlight_notes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
